title: Kinetic Orange Style
description: A high-energy brutalist design system characterized by a high-contrast 'Kinetic Orange' (#FF4D00) and black palette. It features bold, oversized editorial typography, technical monospace accents, and rhythmic motion through marquees and rotating elements. Ideal for creative agencies, fintech, modern portfolios, or AI-driven startups looking for a 'loud' and confident brand presence.
